name: stellog
activities: route child logger levels by facility name

name: custom-log-levels
description: Three custom levels with env-based value shifting. ops(prod=45/dev=28): visible at warn in prod for monitoring, hidden in dev to reduce noise. userError(prod=32/dev=42): hidden at warn in prod, visible in dev to catch API client mistakes. progress(25): execution flow between debug and info.

name: LOGGING-config
description: LOGGING env var or localStorage for per-facility level configuration. Warn-minimum constraint enforced.

name: browser-server-compat
description: Platform detection for Node vs browser. Browser uses Pino browser.write for styled output. Node uses stellog CLI for pino-pretty.

name: child-logger-facade
description: Facade over Pino .child() with facility-based LOGGING level routing. child('name') and child({name}) both trigger lookup. child({...}) without name inherits parent level.
